{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323013554846EDE6B83B55855300D"}"},"total":16},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374244362069164809","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书太酷了！里面的故事充满了想象力，那些神秘的怪物和恐怖的场景让我感觉自己就像在一个奇妙的世界里冒险。我觉得它有点像《哈利·波特》，只不过更加黑暗和恐怖。我特别喜欢《克苏鲁的召唤》这个故事，它让我想起了自己曾经做过的一个噩梦，那种恐怖的感觉真是太真实了！我推荐所有喜欢奇幻和恐怖故事的朋友都来读一读这本书。","text_exts":[{"e":87,"s":84,"text":"克苏鲁","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742009545855300D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227374244362069164809%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227257063760068611128%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%85%8B%E8%8B%8F%E9%B2%81%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":142,"s":138,"text":"恐怖故事","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742009545855300D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227374244362069164809%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227257063760068611128%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715073716,"group_id":"7257063760068611128","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"淡淡的微笑，柔柔的语调，沉醉在爱的每一秒。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+sAQQRh32nU73yMtTLprFTUUpIri6//IDmT4jCIqRji","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6b111945330d472298e9dea96f96721b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795752&x-signature=N8Bo439r%2FAELFGcromgP30rOZFg%3D","user_id":"4055466261352254","user_name":"欲劫无渡"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4055466261352254","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7257063760068611128","book_info":{"abstract":"20世纪影响力极大的奇幻恐怖小说体系！“克苏鲁神话”由美国作家洛夫克拉夫特开创，他构建了一个极其宏大的世界，其间充斥着超越人类认知维度、时空上极为悠远的造物与存在。
乔治.马丁、史蒂芬.金、以及《美国众神》的作者尼尔.盖曼、日本著名漫画家伊藤润二等都是其忠实拥趸。游戏《魔兽世界》《星际争霸》《炉石传说》、科幻巨作《奥特曼》《加勒比海盗》《异形》《蝙蝠侠》等都深受其影响。
本系列由知名译者屈畅选编译著，第一册兼收并蓄，收录了12部经典中短篇小说，包括《克苏鲁的召唤》《神殿》《无名之城》《沙那斯的末日》《皮克曼的模特》《<死灵之书>的历史（大纲）》《古籍》《他》《红钩街区恐怖事件》《冷气》《蜡像馆惊魂》《穿越万古》。一本解锁沉浸式畅读，带你步入恐怖世界！
“我认为世间最大的仁慈，莫过于人脑在融会贯通上的局限。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/db555cb2b6b1108bdb5d974290f96340~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"[美]H.P.洛夫克拉夫特 著,屈畅,赵琳
